name: Heath Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
It's easier to crush the Heath bars if frozen.
1. Prepare the cake according to the directions. Bake in a 9x13-inch pan.
2. While still hot, poke the top full of holes with a wooden spoon handle.
3. Pour the condensed milk over the top.
4. Spread the caramel ice cream topping evenly over the surface.
5. Refrigerate overnight.
6. In a separate bowl, spread the Cool Whip over the cake.
7. Sprinkle the crushed Heath bars on top.
